DatasetTitle: ECONOMIC ACTIVITY BY PROFICIENCY IN ENGLISH BY AGE BY SEX
Annotations: 1. 'Age' is age at last birthday.; 2. For the Census, 'Part-time' is defined as working 30 hours or less per week. 'Full-time' is defined as working 31 or more hours per week.; 3. 'Unemployed' excludes full-time students.;
